notableEvents.label: Colt Keith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Jeremy Peña. Riley Greene out at 2nd. Colt Keith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews grounds out, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers grounds into a force out, shortstop Zach McKinstry to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee. Cam Smith out at 2nd. Jake Meyers to 1st.
